name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-16
title: spec invariant 9 (build-contract validation) lacks runtime enforcement (only test verifies)
description: Spec invariant 9 says build-contract.json validates against build-contract.schema.json. test-build-contract.py verifies this at test time but no hook validates on edit. A direct edit to build-contract.json that breaks the schema would not be caught until tests run. Add a pre-commit or on-save validation hook.
